pages.title: Testosterone
pages.content:
### Comprehensive Overview of @DejaRu22's Statements on Testosterone and Increasing It

Based on an exhaustive review of @DejaRu22's posts mentioning "testosterone" from May 2021 to February 2026, he frequently discusses testosterone levels, their decline in modern society, correlations with behavior/politics, and various methods to increase it. He emphasizes that testosterone is essential for vitality, assertiveness, and health, often contrasting high-T traits with "low-T" or "soy" behaviors. Many posts repeat similar advice, suggesting he views these as core principles.

He attributes declining testosterone to modern factors like plastics, processed foods, and societal programming, noting levels are half what they were 50 years ago and that today's average male has the testosterone of his grandfather. He links higher testosterone to right-wing views, honesty, effort feeling good, and physical features like a prominent supraorbital ridge. He dismisses "sex addiction" as simply high testosterone and warns against demonizing aggression, predicting it could lead to mandatory estrogen treatments.

Below is a categorized summary of his advice on **increasing testosterone**, drawing from unique methods across posts (with examples of repeats noted). I've included direct quotes where relevant, prioritized serious suggestions over clear jokes/sarcasm (e.g., ignoring "Coke Zero boosts T" or "drink Coke and affirm it"), and used a table for clarity.

Key Methods to Increase Testosterone

=== 528Hz Frequency ===

Listening to 528Hz music clinically raises testosterone levels. Repeated as a simple, effective hack. | "Did you know 528hz has been clinically shown to increase testosterone levels?" (multiple repeats). 

== Raw Garlic & Onions == 
Eat large amounts daily (raw) to massively boost testosterone, improve immunity, and increase horniness/libido. Drink water to mitigate smell. | "Eat raw garlic Eat raw onion Lots. Every day. Morning and night... massively boost your testosterone cheap and easy." "If you want to be so horny you can’t think: Eat tons of garlic Eat tons of onion... IT WILL SHOOT YOUR TESTOSTERONE LEVELS THROUGH THE ROOF." Also cites rat study and human experiment where 4 raw onions/day tripled T.

=== Tongkat Ali Supplement === 
One of the few supplements that "actually" works; boosts T by 37% in 4 weeks, reduces tension/anger/confusion. Pairs with boron, MACA, Vit D. | "Tongkat Ali. Is one of the few supplements that you actually feel a tangible kick on. Study found: After taking it for 4 weeks? Testosterone increased by 37%." (highly repeated).

=== Smoking Tobacco/Cigars === 
Positive effect on T; increases levels by 15% total/13% free vs. non-smokers. Organic preferred; combats nanobots/Alzheimer's. | "Smoking increases testosterone. Testosterone is muscle sparing." "Reminder that smoking tobacco destroys nanobots, prevents alzheimers, raises testosterone..." Cites studies (frequent topic).

=== Red Wine ===
Quercetin blocks enzyme, raising free T. Suggests 2 glasses with dinner for psychedelic-like effects. | "FUN FACT: RED WINE INCREASES TESTOSTERONE 🍷 This is because the Quercetin in the red wine, blocks the UGT2B17 enzyme from attaching to testosterone." |

=== Sunning Testicles ===
10-20 minutes direct sunlight on balls boosts T by 200%.                             | "Gentlemen, casual reminder to sun your nuts today for a 200% increase in testosterone production."

=== Winning/Competition ===
Victory in tasks (especially witnessed) raises T; decreases cortisol. Avoid home gyms for this reason. | "WINNING increases your testosterone level while simultaneously DECREASING cortisol." "DONT LIFT IN A HOME GYM A study... found that: Men who engaged in a competitive task experienced a RISE in testosterone levels after WINNING... EVEN MORE pronounced when the victory was *WITNESSED*." |

=== TRT/Exogenous Testosterone === 
Recommends for 35+ or due to modern declines; pin 250mg/week after 25. Peaks at ~25, declines 1% yearly. | "If you’re 35+ there is literally zero reason not to be on testosterone replacement therapy." "Natural testosterone production peaks at 25... Until you’re 25 you should be on an absolute mission to pack on as much muscle..."

=== Eggs/Cholesterol ===
Cholesterol in eggs is necessary for T synthesis; dismisses myths.                    | "There is no greater quality source of protein than in eggs. And the “cholesterol” shit... is a complete distortion... You need that to synthesise testosterone." |

=== No Underwear === 
Wearing it lowers T and sperm count.                                                 | "Friendly reminder that wearing underwear lowers testosterone and kills your sperm count." |

=== Sauna/Sweating ===
Removes microplastics/endocrine disruptors causing T decline.                        | "Testosterone levels are falling... How/Why? ...you’re being fucking poisoned by micro plastics... sweating is effective at moving the shit out. GET IN THE SAUNA TODAY."

=== Posture ===
Good posture raises T levels.                                                        | "Your posture RIGHT NOW is dictating how much testosterone your body is releasing. Sit the fuck up like you believe in yourself."

== High-T Lifestyle/Situations ===
Body produces more T if lifestyle demands it; be in T-requiring scenarios.           | "Nothing increases testosterone more than consistently being in situations that require testosterone." "A High T life is the best testbooster."

=== Steak & Wine ===
Ultimate T-fueling combo.                                                            | "STEAK AND WINE: THE ULTIMATE TESTOSTERONE FUELLING COMBINATION." |

=== Avoid Low-T Factors ===
Avoid weed (lowers T), processed foods, plastics; prioritize sleep/exercise/sun (mocks as obvious but acknowledges). | Various posts.              |

== Other Notable Comments ==
- Decline Over Time**: T peaks at 25, declines 1%/year; modern men at grandfather levels.
-High-T Traits**: Rebelliousness, fighting ability, deeper voice, speeding (high-T trait).
- Examples of Low T**: 284 ng/dL, anxiety/ADHD misdiagnosed as high T.
- Misc/Jokes**: German as "highest testosterone language"; honey badgers; smoking in no-smoking areas.

This covers all relevant content. He often cites studies informally (e.g., for Tongkat Ali, smoking) and encourages action without overthinking. Note: Some advice (e.g., smoking, TRT) may contradict mainstream health views; consult professionals.

pages.title: Coffee And Caffeine
pages.content:
== Overall Stance & Personal Experience ==
Strong pro-caffeine/coffee advocate: He repeatedly says he "freaking love[s] caffeine!!!" and highlights massive upsides with minimal downsides.
=== Personal experiments:  ===
* In 2022: Quit coffee almost entirely (only ~4 cups/year) → noticed zero benefits from abstaining.
* In 2023 onward: Heavy/high intake → pure benefits in performance, alertness, and more; "better in just about every way imaginable."
* One early post (2022) called needing caffeine a sign of weakness (like using assisted pull-ups), but his later views shifted to embracing it fully after testing.
* High doses don't faze him; he mocks people who get jittery after just 2 cups as having a "weak constitution" (they "would not have made it past age 13 in prior ages").

== Benefits & Effects  ==
* Performance enhancer: "Pure upside," keeps you "alert af," "wired and sharp," helps "smoke everyone and run laps."
* Anti-carcinogenic / detox: "Massively anti-carcinogenic" — recommends making it mandatory in high-pollution areas (most places) for protection.
* Stacking synergies:Pair with L-theanine to eliminate jitters → makes caffeine "smooth and cleanly focused" (glutamate receptor antagonist).
* Bonus with tobacco, or in stacks like citrulline malate, beta alanine, yohimbine.
* In nootropic/anti-brain-fog stacks: creatine (megadose), lion’s mane, rhodiola, dark chocolate, blueberries → "wired and sharp"; extra points with caffeine/tobacco.
* Historical high-dose flex: Celebrates legends like Napoleon (20 cups/day), Bach (30), Teddy Roosevelt (40), Voltaire (50) → implies high tolerance = high achievement.

pages.title: Sauna
pages.content:
=== Etiquette & How to Actually Use a Sauna ===
* Strip down completely:
* Take your clothes off. Definitely take your shoes off. ("you dumb FUCK" — his emphasis).
* No plastic water bottles inside — leave them outside.
* No phone — go at least 10 minutes without it.
* Keep it normal and non-performative: Stop with the weird esoteric gimmicks (e.g., drinking raw milk from a wine glass in the sauna). Just go in like a normal person. Performative stuff makes people associate saunas with "being a gay weirdo" and puts them off.
* Reading in the sauna? He questions how anyone does it without absolutely soaking the book in sweat.

=== Frequency & Minimums ===
* Daily is ideal: "Hit the sauna today. 20 minutes minimum. Go."
* 2–3x per week minimum: At least 20 minutes per session to expel "toxic evil little demons living in your pores that make you sick and gay."
* Channeled advice: "Get your ass in the sauna today. Get them heat shock proteins into your system."

=== Detox & Health Benefits ===
* Major detox tool: Saunas help remove pollutants from environment and food. "What if there’s, like, pollutants in our environment and food… And like… You can detox through a sauna?"
* Sweat as detox: Fresh sweat contains pheromones that are attractive to women (doesn’t last once it dries) → "Take her on a sauna date."
* For toxin exposure (e.g., fire smoke): Double up on sauna sessions right now. He linked a firefighter document on sauna use for removing toxins like heavy metals via sweat (though the doc itself is cautious about risks for firefighters).
* Alternative if no sauna: A hot bath works surprisingly well to make you sweat a lot.

=== Sauna Protocols He Recommends ===
* Basic motivational check-in: "DID YOU SAUNA TODAY?" (with video of someone in a sauna).
* Advanced altered-state protocol (his "highest I’ve ever gotten stone cold sober"):Sauna: 10 minutes in, 2 minutes out. Repeat 5 times.
* Then cold pool: Long deep breaths, stay very still, fixate your gaze on a single point.
* Result: Quick hallucinations, breakthrough into a "subtler realm" where you can hear voices of higher beings. It stops when you return to normal temperature.

Contrast therapy warning: In a Japanese onsen, going sauna → cold pool → sauna → cold pool and staying in too long caused "intrusive visions and voices of oriental deities."

Warnings & ObservationsCompetitive egos beware: "The sauna can be a dangerous place for competitive egos."
Lung-friendly: Sauna is fine; some other breathing practices "fuck with delicate mucus membrane in your lungs."
Not for show: He mocks over-the-top "esoteric health dudes" who make saunas seem weird, saying it discourages normal people from using them.

Other NuggetsHe’s referenced his own sauna posts so often that he tells people to just search "from:dejaru22 sauna".
He celebrates simple sauna use as a top life-changing habit (in response to a Huberman-style list).
General vibe: Sauna is essential, powerful, and should be straightforward — no need to overcomplicate or clown around.

These posts have thousands of likes and views, showing he’s quite passionate about getting people into saunas regularly. If you want the raw threads, videos, or images from specific posts, let me know

pages.title: Astrology
pages.content:
=== Core Stance on Reality & Importance ===
* Astrology is real: Direct statements like "Reminder: astrology is real" (with images/memes emphasizing celestial influences). He sees it as tied to observable celestial mechanics and ancient wisdom.
* Highly important for timing & life navigation: He tracks major transits like Mercury retrograde (communications/tech/travel disruptions), Saturn retrograde (discipline/executive function dips), and celebrates their endings as upgrades ("patch notes" boosting function, reducing glitches/bullshit tolerance).Examples: "Mercury retrograde has ended. ++ people actually hear you again ++ miscommunications resolve..." or "Saturn retrograde has ended. ++ executive function regained ++ discipline becomes easier."
* He calls certain periods "the messiest mercury retrograde of all" or notes "This mercury is definitely retrograding" — showing he uses it for real-time awareness and preparation.
* Cosmic cycles & divine order: Links astrology to sacred numbers (e.g., 72 = precession of equinoxes by 1 degree → cycles/order encoded in myths like 72 accomplices of Set, 72 disciples of Jesus, 72 Goetic demons/angels, etc.). Sees it as revealing universal patterns ("As above, so below").
* Birth timing significance: Emphasizes not just zodiac signs but day of the week you're born on (named after planets/deities: Wednesday = Mercury/Hermes day, etc.). Calls it "extremely significant" because birth moment imprints celestial energies — "the universe welcomes you in with a celestial kiss." Notes many of his best friends share his Wednesday birth.
* Planetary symbolism & archetypes: Connects planets to mythic figures (Mercury = Hermes/Thoth/Enoch/Odin/Metatron — "variants of Universal Mind"). Jokes about cultural ignorance (e.g., Future naming himself after "planet" Pluto without knowing deeper naming reasons/mythology). References Pluto in Aquarius energies for societal upheaval (e.g., Nepal protests/discord PM election as "Pluto in Aquarius type shit").
* Practical/spiritual value: Uses it for personal insight, humor (e.g., "dancing around the rings of Saturn" in psychedelic contexts), and awakening themes (aligns with his bio's "preternatural inculcations & anagoge"). Sees it as decoding hidden forces, not random superstition.
* Mocks dismissals: Sarcastically parodies religious renouncements of astrology by comparing it to rejecting weather forecasts ("seasons aren’t real… Knowing what the rainfall will be like next week, is demonic"). Argues if you accept meteorology (weather patterns), why reject astrology (celestial patterns)?

=== Overall Vibe & Frequency ===
* Posts often during key transits — high engagement (thousands of likes/views) on retrograde updates and "astrology is real" reminders.
* Blends serious esoteric knowledge (mythic encodings, planetary archetypes) with playful/modern framing ("patch notes," memes).
* No major criticisms from him — he doesn't call it fake, overrated, or dangerous; instead, he promotes engagement with it as part of awakening/understanding reality.

In summary, DejaRu22 views astrology as genuinely real, cosmically important, and practically useful for timing, self-understanding, and perceiving divine/cyclic order in life. He actively follows and shares its effects, treating it like a reliable operating system update for human experience rather than fringe belief.If you'd like deeper dives into specific posts (e.g., images from his "astrology is real" thread or transit memes), or his takes on particular signs/planets, let me know!

pages.title: Energy
pages.content:
== Core Beliefs & Direct Statements ==

METABOLIC HEALTH = VITALITY = CAPACITY. Being low energy will ENSURE you get nowhere. HIGH ENERGY * ABLE TO DIRECT IT = LEGEND."

* High-energy people live extended "days": "One of the downsides of being a high energy person.. You operate on 32 hour days... you either play out your natural rhythms... OR have to have the discipline to make yourself go to bed when you're not even remotely tired."

* Breath is foundational: "To be LIVING fully, you need to be GENERATING ENERGY fully. To be generating energy fully, you need to be BREATHING properly... ENGAGING YOUR WHOLE DIAPHRAGM... feel the muscles of your back expand and contract." (Straight spine, chin tucked.)Ancient Chinese doctrine: Life force comes from 1) proper deep diaphragmatic breathing, 2) truly enjoying food (pleasure with every bite boosts energy).
* Rest as fuel: "One of the most productive things you can do... is NOTHING! ... Getting QUALITY REST... REST and PERFORMANCE are antithetical yet supplementary... One at a time = REAL results."

* Other boosters: Slight under-eating (80% full) for greater vitality/slug-free feeling; carrot juice/salad for radiant glow and vitality; conscious enjoyment of meals; avoiding energy drains like poor posture or mindless habits.
* Sexual/sublimated energy: High-vitality people (e.g., older figures "brimming with more health and vitality than your favourite health guru") wield it powerfully.

Overall PhilosophyEnergy/vitality isn't optional fluff — it's supreme because:
* It determines your real-world capacity and output.
* Low energy = guaranteed mediocrity/failure.
* High + directed energy = legend-level life.
* It's accessible via breath, rest, enjoyment, retention, and metabolic hacks — not just supplements or gym.

Negative self-talk casts harmful spells that fuck you up; positive/high-vibe language brightens your aura, moves reality harder, and aligns you with manifestation/awareness.

And every word an incantation. Never say a sentence that you do not want to become true."

pages.title: Intuition and Divine Guidance

 treats intuition as a sacred, infallible divine gift — directly from God — and the primary channel for divine guidance in life. It's never wrong, gets clearer with practice, and serves as superior guidance over external advice, overthinking, or intellectual clutter.

pages.title: Chakra
pages.content:
Listen up. Chakras aren't crystals or Instagram aesthetics. They're the literal control panels of your consciousness. Your entire reality—how you think, feel, act, and ascend—runs through these seven spinning vortices along your spine.The lower three? Animal mode: eat, fuck, dominate.
The heart? The pivot where "me" becomes "we."
The upper three? God mode: truth, vision, infinite awareness.Most people are stuck in the basement. The awakened climb. Here's exactly what each chakra governs and the warrior protocols to develop it. Do the work daily. No excuses.meditativemind.org

1. Root Chakra (Muladhara) – RedWhat it does: Your base. Survival, grounding, physical security. It keeps you alive in the material world. Weak = constant fear, scattered energy, "not enough" mentality. Strong = unshakeable foundation. You stand like a mountain no matter what storms hit.How to develop it:  Barefoot on earth every morning (10-20 mins). Feel the planet charge you.  
Heavy compound lifts: squats, deadlifts. Build the body like armor.  
Eat red roots: beets, carrots, red meat.  
Affirmation while walking: "I am here. I am safe. I am rooted."  
Never skip leg day—literally. Your root is your legs and spine.

2. Sacral Chakra (Svadhisthana) – OrangeWhat it does: The flow state. Creativity, sexuality, emotions, pleasure. This is where life force (shakti) gets generated. Blocked = creative drought, emotional numbness, or toxic addictions. Open = magnetic sensuality and effortless creation.How to develop it:  Move your hips daily: dance, yoga hip openers, or just freestyle to music.  
Create something—write, paint, cook. No judgment, just output.  
Healthy pleasure: tantric sex or solo practice without porn.  
Orange foods and sacral breathing (deep belly breaths).  
Feel your emotions fully—don't repress. Let them flow like water.

3. Solar Plexus Chakra (Manipura) – YellowWhat it does: Your power center. Willpower, confidence, personal agency, digestion of experiences. This is where you turn intention into action. Weak = people-pleasing, gut issues, victim mode. Strong = you command rooms and realities.How to develop it:  Core fire: planks, dragon breath (kapalabhati), or just hold a strong posture.  
Set one non-negotiable boundary per day and enforce it.  
Yellow sunlight + yellow foods (bananas, ginger).  
Visualize a golden sun burning in your belly—feed it with decisive action.  
Win small battles. Stack them. Ego death through discipline.

4. Heart Chakra (Anahata) – GreenWhat it does: The bridge. Unconditional love, compassion, connection. Shifts you from "me me me" hell to seeing the divine in everyone. Closed = isolation, resentment, chest tightness. Open = you radiate and attract like a magnet.How to develop it:  Daily gratitude rampage: name 10 things/people you love (out loud).  
Acts of service with zero expectation. Help a stranger.  
Heart openers: camel pose, backbends, or just deep chest breathing.  
Green foods, nature immersion. Forgive someone who doesn't deserve it—starting with you.  
Feel the "other" as Self. That's the ascension key.

5. Throat Chakra (Vishuddha) – BlueWhat it does: Pure expression. Truth, communication, manifestation through words. Open = your voice cuts through noise like a blade (think McGregor or Oreb). Blocked = lies, silence, sore throats, unfulfilled potential.How to develop it:  Speak your truth daily—even when it costs you. No white lies.  
Chant, sing, or project your voice (record yourself—fix the weak spots).  
Blueberries, seaweed, lemon water. Neck rolls and lion's breath.  
Write unsent letters to release repressed words. Then burn them.  
Command with clarity. Your words become reality when this is lit.

6. Third Eye Chakra (Ajna) – IndigoWhat it does: Inner vision. Intuition, insight, higher intelligence. The pineal gland HQ. This is where you see the unseen, discern truth from bullshit. Shut = confusion, overthinking, spiritual blindness. Open = you navigate life like a seer.How to develop it:  Daily third eye meditation: Eyes closed, awareness pinned exactly between eyebrows, 1 inch in. Hold it.  
Chant OM 108 times (use mala beads).  
Kill the poisons: no fluoride (filter water, natural toothpaste), limit EMFs, sungaze at dawn/dusk (build slow).  
Iodine + raw cacao for pineal decalcification.  
Journal synchronicities. Trust the hits. Discernment is the real superpower.

dreamstime.com

7. Crown Chakra (Sahasrara) – VioletWhat it does: Direct line to Source. Enlightenment, unity consciousness, pure knowing. Full activation = you're not in the game anymore—you're the game. The 144,000 frequency: all petals open (4+6+10+12+16+96+1000).How to develop it:  Silent meditation 20+ mins daily (no thoughts, just presence).  
Surrender practices: let go of "I" completely.  
Purple foods, fasting, time in total darkness.  
Align the lower six first—crown won't bloom on shaky ground.  
Live as if you're already connected. Because you are.

The Non-Negotiable Foundation for All Energy Work
Spine straight. Chin tucked. Tongue on roof of mouth. This is how energy flows up the sushumna without leaks.Earth's Chakras – Go pilgrimage if you can:
Shasta (root), Titicaca (sacral), Uluru (solar), Stonehenge (heart), Pyramid (throat), Kailash (crown).Start today. Pick one chakra that's weakest. Hammer it for 21 days. Then the next.Your level of consciousness is exactly where your dominant chakra sits. Move it up.The crown is calling. Answer with action.Namaste, warriors.

pages.title: Hydration and Water
pages.content:
@DejaRu22
 (DR22 Ω ) frequently emphasizes hydration as a foundational aspect of health, performance, and feeling good overall. He argues that most people are chronically dehydrated, which contributes to feeling like shit, brain fog, fatigue, poor recovery, low energy, skin issues, and more. He views proper hydration as a simple but transformative fix that many overlook.His key points on how much water to drink and related advice include:
* Most people are chronically dehydrated, and simply improving hydration leads to massive improvements in energy, brain function, recovery, and overall well-being.
* 2L of water a day is basically the minimum for a sedentary person (he calls it "what a sedentary girl needs").
* For active, serious, high-performing individuals (those pursuing greatness, training hard, etc.), aim for around 4L per day to perform at your best.
* In other posts, he has suggested 3L daily as a solid target for proper hydration.
* Always add high-quality salt (e.g., Celtic sea salt, pink Himalayan salt, or sea salt) to your water to help transport it into cells and ensure electrolytes — this prevents issues and supports cellular hydration. He mentions risks like mineral dilution only kick in above 5L+ if you're not getting electrolytes.
* He often recommends enhancing water with things like:Raw honey + sea salt for supreme hydration.
* Lemon water (sometimes with apple cider vinegar).
* Natural sources like coconut water, watermelon juice, celery juice, carrot juice, raw sugar cane juice, or fruit juices for better cellular hydration and performance.
* He stresses that plain water alone isn't always enough — focus on cellular hydration with electrolytes and quality additions.
* One example pre-workout replacement: 5g high-quality salt in water + spoonful of raw honey (mogs pre-workout supplements).
* He has said things like "Whenever I say 'Drink water' I am actually talking about Coconut Water OR Water + Sea Salt + Honey" for true cellular hydration.

In short, DejaRu22 pushes back against minimal "official" guidelines, insisting that higher intake (3-4L+, salted/electrolyte-enhanced) is key for anyone serious about optimization, not just survival-level hydration. He repeats that many problems vanish once you "get on top of your hydration." This is based on his direct posts on X, where he often calls out dehydration as a hidden cause of widespread malaise.

pages.title: Cardio
pages.content:
@DejaRu22
 discusses cardio (cardiovascular training/endurance) in several posts, often in the context of fitness, fat loss, metabolism, and gym habits. His takes blend practical advice with high-intensity emphasis and lifestyle integration. He doesn't provide a single comprehensive "guide," but recurring themes emerge from his posts (primarily 2023–2026).Key Views on CardioHigh-Intensity Preference: He praises intense sessions that push limits. One post states: "Cardio that has you (nearly) throwing up >>>" — indicating he values sessions that feel brutal and demanding.
StairMaster as Top Choice: He repeatedly calls it the "best cardio machine hands down" and "supremacy." Recommendations include moderate-intensity sessions while distracted (e.g., watching UFC or shows with headphones) — you'll "forget you're even doing cardio" and burn ~500+ calories/hour. In one example, he burned 800 calories on it during a fight without noticing the effort much.
Fasted Cardio for Metabolism: He endorses "brief fasted cardio" (exercising before eating) as an "old bodybuilding trick" to prime metabolism. Pair it with a good breakfast afterward to keep the "furnace" raging. He clarifies it simply means training fasted, not extreme prolonged fasting.
Other Forms: Swimming: "Great cardio, genuinely soothing, get tanned... a wonder why more don’t indulge."
Running: He committed to 10km runs daily when unhappy with his cardio level, emphasizing the body adapts to demands ("The body will respond to the level of energy which you demand from it").

General Integration: Avoid being sedentary (e.g., do cardio while watching sports instead of couch-potato mode). He ties it to overall intensity in training: heart racing, soaked in sweat, etc., for real results. Sex is "far from 'just' cardio" — implying it's more multifaceted.

What to Do, How Long, and How to ImproveFrom his posts, here's synthesized advice:What to Do: Prioritize StairMaster (moderate pace, entertaining distraction to make it sustainable). Alternatives: running, swimming, or any form that allows consistency. Incorporate fasted sessions occasionally for metabolic benefits. Make it habitual — e.g., morning cardio to wake up energized.
How Long/Duration: No strict universal rule, but examples include:Brief sessions for fasted work.
1+ hour on StairMaster (burning 500–800 calories).
Daily 10km runs when building capacity.
Aim for sessions long/intense enough to soak your shirt, spike heart rate heavily, and feel challenging.

How to Improve Cardio: Demand more from your body — ramp up frequency, distance, or intensity progressively (e.g., commit to daily runs if it's weak). Push to near-vomit levels for breakthroughs. Consistency + high effort = adaptation. Distract yourself during longer sessions to tolerate more volume without mental fatigue.

His overall vibe: Cardio isn't just "steady-state plodding" — make it intense, enjoyable (via distractions/entertainment), and metabolic-boosting where possible. Avoid low-effort sessions; results come from pushing boundaries. These are pulled from his public posts; he may have more in threads or replies not fully captured here.
